title: althaea lusitanica
intro: Althaea lusitanica, also known as the Portuguese marshmallow, is a perennial plant native to the Iberian Peninsula, primarily found in Portugal and Spain. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and soothing effects. The health benefits of Althaea lusitanica include reducing inflammation and pain, soothing digestive issues, and promoting wound healing. Althaea lusitanica is often prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and can also be found in topical creams and ointments for skin and wound care.
